title: Crotalaria mohlenbrockii

This family is further divided into several subfamilies, including Faboideae, to which Crotalaria mohlenbrockii belongs. Within the subfamily Faboideae, Crotalaria mohlenbrockii is classified as a member of the tribe Crotalariaeae. The genus Crotalaria to which Crotalaria mohlenbrockii belongs is a group of plants native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Crotalaria mohlenbrockii is a species of flowering plant in the genus Crotalaria.
